import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import AdminNavbar from '../components/AdminNavbar'; import AdminSidebar from '../components/AdminSidebar'; import { useBookings } from '../context/BookingContext'; import { useVehicles } from '../context/VehicleContext'; const ManageReports = () => { const { getBookings, getPayments } = useBookings(); const { vehicles } = useVehicles(); const [reportType, setReportType] = useState('all'); const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(''); const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState(''); const [stats, setStats] = useState({ totalBookings: 0, totalRevenue: 0, totalCustomers: 0, totalVehicles: 0, completedBookings: 0, pendingBookings: 0, cancelledBookings: 0 }); const [recentReports, setRecentReports] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { const allBookings = getBookings(); const allPayments = getPayments(); // Calculate statistics from real data const completedPayments = allPayments.filter(p => p.status === 'Completed'); const totalRevenue = completedPayments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.amount || 0), 0); const uniqueCustomers = new Set(allBookings.map(b => b.userId)).size; const completedBookings = allBookings.filter(b => b.status === 'Completed').length; const pendingBookings = allBookings.filter(b => b.status === 'Pending').length; const cancelledBookings = allBookings.filter(b => b.status === 'Cancelled' || b.status === 'Not Approved').length; setStats({ totalBookings: allBookings.length, totalRevenue, totalCustomers: uniqueCustomers, totalVehicles: vehicles.length, completedBookings, pendingBookings, cancelledBookings }); // Generate reports from real data const reports = [ { id: 'RPT-001', type: 'Bookings', dateGenerated: new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' }), period: 'All Time', total: `${allBookings.length} bookings`, status: 'Completed' }, { id: 'RPT-002', type: 'Revenue', dateGenerated: new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' }), period: 'All Time', total: `₱${totalRevenue.toLocaleString()}`, status: 'Completed' }, { id: 'RPT-003', type: 'Customers', dateGenerated: new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' }), period: 'All Time', total: `${uniqueCustomers} customers`, status: 'Completed' }, { id: 'RPT-004', type: 'Vehicles', dateGenerated: new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' }), period: 'All Time', total: `${vehicles.length} vehicles`, status: 'Completed' } ]; setRecentReports(reports); }, [getBookings, getPayments, vehicles]); const generateReport = () => { alert('Report generated based on current data!'); }; return (

Manage Reports

setStartDate(e.target.value)} style={styles.dateInput} /> setEndDate(e.target.value)} style={styles.dateInput} />

Easy BookingQuick and Hassle free online reservations
); }; const styles = { container: { display: 'flex', minHeight: '100vh', backgroundColor: '#f7fbfc', fontFamily: 'Inria Serif, serif' }, mainContent: { flex: 1, marginLeft: '250px', marginTop: '60px', padding: '20px' }, contentWrapper: { maxWidth: '1040px', margin: '0 auto' }, pageTitle: { fontWeight: 700, fontSize: '24px', marginBottom: '18px' }, topBar: { display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', marginBottom: '14px', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '12px' }, filters: { display: 'flex', gap: '10px', alignItems: 'center', flexWrap: 'wrap', flex: '1 1 auto' }, select: { borderRadius: '10px', border: '1.6px solid #9aa1ba', padding: '7.5px 14px', fontWeight: 600, fontSize: '14px', color: '#444', cursor: 'pointer' }, dateInput: { borderRadius: '10px', border: '1.6px solid #9aa1ba', padding: '7.5px 14px', fontWeight: 600, fontSize: '14px', color: '#444' }, filterBtn: { backgroundColor: '#5563d6', border: 'none', borderRadius: '8px', fontWeight: 700, fontSize: '14px', padding: '9px 32px', color: 'white', cursor: 'pointer' }, summaryBlocks: { display: 'flex', gap: '16px', marginBottom: '20px', flexWrap: 'wrap' }, summaryBlock: { flex: '1 1 0', padding: '18px 20px', borderRadius: '10px', boxShadow: '1px 3px 10px rgba(131,153,207,0.37)', backgroundColor: 'white', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '20px', minWidth: '200px' }, summaryIcon: { width: '48px', height: '48px', strokeWidth: 2 }, summaryText: { display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column' }, bookingStats: { display: 'flex', gap: '15px', marginBottom: '20px', flexWrap: 'wrap' }, bookingStat: { flex: '1 1 0', background: 'white', padding: '15px 20px', borderRadius: '8px', textAlign: 'center', minWidth: '120px' }, bookingStatValue: { display: 'block', fontSize: '28px', fontWeight: 700, color: '#28a745' }, bookingStatLabel: { fontSize: '12px', color: '#666', fontWeight: 600 }, chartContainer: { background: 'white', borderRadius: '10px', boxShadow: '1px 6px 16px rgb(157,172,219,0.21)', padding: '18px 24px', marginBottom: '16px' }, chartTitle: { fontWeight: 700, fontSize: '21px', marginBottom: '15px', color: '#253475' }, chartPlaceholder: { display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-around', alignItems: 'flex-end', height: '200px', padding: '20px 0', borderBottom: '2px solid #eee' }, chartBarContainer: { display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center', gap: '10px', flex: 1 }, chartBar: { width: '40px', borderRadius: '4px 4px 0 0' }, chartLabel: { fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 600, color: '#666' }, tableContainer: { background: 'white', boxShadow: '4px 5px 15px rgb(190,192,221,0.48)', borderRadius: '14px', overflowX: 'auto' }, table: { width: '100%', borderCollapse: 'collapse', minWidth: '910px' }, th: { padding: '18px 20px', color: '#445baa', fontWeight: 700, textAlign: 'left', backgroundColor: '#d5d8fa', borderBottom: '3px solid #475fda' }, td: { padding: '15px 20px', color: '#3a3f68', fontSize: '14.2px', borderBottom: '1.5px solid #dfe3fb' }, tr: { borderBottom: '1.5px solid #dfe3fb' }, statusCompleted: { padding: '7px 16px', borderRadius: '14px', fontWeight: 700, fontSize: '13.5px', color: 'white', backgroundColor: '#375a15' }, statusPending: { padding: '7px 16px', borderRadius: '14px', fontWeight: 700, fontSize: '13.5px', color: 'white', backgroundColor: '#a38210' }, actionBtn: { background: 'none', border: 'none', cursor: 'pointer', fontSize: '16px', padding: '5px', margin: '0 2px' }, infoRow: { marginTop: '38px', background: 'white', borderRadius: '14px', boxShadow: '0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)', padding: '22px 30px', display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', gap: '40px', flexWrap: 'wrap' }, infoBox: { display: 'flex', gap: '20px', maxWidth: '33%', minWidth: '200px' }, infoSvg: { width: '48px', height: '48px', stroke: '#222' }, }; export default ManageReports;
